title: BRG Energies
description: Conducted market research, customer exploration, developing  platform specific engagement strategies, produced and presented final timeline, mockups, and deliverable to client

title: Image and Audio Classification System
description: Designed, trained, and finalized image and audio classification models using Python, improving automated dataset labeling and recognition accuracy.

title: Custom Data Processing Framework
description: Engineered a Java-based DataFrame system modeled after Pandas, enabling high-performance data storage, indexing, and manipulation

title: Recipes and Ratings Analysis
description: Conducted full data science process, including data cleaning, exploratory analysis, hypothesis testing, and developing a machine learning model to explore the relationship between the features of food recipes and how those features can predict ratings of recipes.

title: Triton Treasure Map Webpage
description: Developed a website to help UCSD students find optimal study spots, weekend activities and dining halls based on personalized preferences.

title: Grades Analysis
description: Developed an algorithm to clean and analyze data of a gradebook for a data science class, finding finalized grades based on different grading schemes and creating heatmaps and graphs to visualize class performance.

title: Loan Application Analysis
description: Worked with a public dataset from LendingClub loan applications to understand lender decision making, calculate disposable income, and identify simpsons paradox in the dataset. Conducted EDA and created visualizations of different aggregates of the data.

title: Language Model Creation
description: Prepared, dissected and tokened a corpus, developed a baseline language model, and trained and developed a finalized N-Gram LLM.

title: On the Go Energy
description: Developed an extensive start-up business plan, pitched to VCs at Radar partners. Developed financial statements and analysis, helped develop prototype with manufacturers for market testing. Participated in an esteemed business incubation program at Santa Clara University
